title: Da Goopy Modpack
description: This is a well-rounded modpack with shaders! It has tech, magic, exploration and much more to discover! :3
body:
### Da Goopy Modpack!
This modpack has a little bit of everything for every player:
- Tech
- Magic
- New Structures
- A New Dimension
- Decorations
- Harder bosses
- Visual Improvements
- Optomization 
- And Much More!
